list.vod_blurb: Troubled interns get their last shot at Sydney&#039;s underfunded Pines Hospital, battling personal demons and past failures while treating patients in life-or-death situations.
list.vod_content: Troubled interns get their last shot at Sydney's underfunded Pines Hospital, battling personal demons and past failures while treating patients in life-or-death situations.
